title: Mailchimp vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Mailchimp vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Mailchimp and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Mailchimp is built for beginners and small businesses, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on beginners and small businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Mailchimp wins for beginners and small businesses, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Mailgun?
faq.a: Mailchimp starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
